repo.run: npm run dev (node server.js, port 5173; serves game + tools + GET/PUT /api/data/<path>; game hot-reload-polls /data/*.json every 2s)

designer.who: Septentrion — NOT a programmer; drives everything through the browser tools and plain-language batches
workflow_rules: Designer playtests constantly: uncommitted data/*.json / public asset changes in the tree are THEIRS — commit separately as 'Designer data edits via tools', NEVER revert, never mix into code commits
One commit per slice, imperative subject; verify (tests+tsc+boot) BEFORE committing
Designer pastes Windows file paths into tools — normalize to URLs under public/

architecture.stack: Vite + three.js + TypeScript, PWA (manifest+SW: network-only /data+/api, never cache them)
architecture.principle: Everything data-driven: if the designer might change it, it is a JSON field with a tool UI, not code. No magic numbers — tunables in data/tuning.json.
architecture.game_modules_pattern: game/*.ts = pure headless-testable logic + thin three.js/UI layer. Precedents: doors, accidents, sprites, marker, quests, visas, work, phone, garbage, buymode, bills, food, happiness, censor, progressbar, bladder, duration, wallview, windows, camera, facing, nav, audio, fbxclips, sprites, contextmenu (in ui), work.
architecture.tools_pattern: tools/*.html: plain inline script exposed as window.<Tool> (jsdom-testable) + separate type=module script only when three.js/game imports needed; tools import game logic, never reimplement; PUT whole files JSON.stringify(data,null,2); shared tools/nav.js tab strip (add new tools to its TOOLS list)
architecture.sim_time_rule: All gameplay animation/timers run on sim-time sdt (pause/buy-mode/game-over freeze, 2x/3x scale); real-time only for cosmetics
architecture.side_effect_rule: Action side effects (cleanup, waste, accident rolls, food spawn-at-arrival, promotion rolls) fire ONLY on completed actions (stopAction(completed=true)) — never on cancels/interrupts

data_files.data/assets.json: AssetDef: category (incl. transient/door/window), mesh (GLB or image/GIF sprite), icon, buyable, requiresQuestUnlock, footprint, facingDeg, meshFit, usePose{sit,lie,use}, seats/seatTarget, interactions[], environmentScore, sound, accidents[] risk, combustibility, clearedBy, garbage{capacity}, food{hungerGain,perishHours}, survivalImportance, light{color,intensity,distance,yOffset,defaultOn}, wallMounted{heightY}, door{...exterior}, sprite{orientation,fps}
data_files.data/interactions.json: ActionDef: animation, autonomyEligible, seatAware, censor, primaryNeed, needGains/skillGains, conditions (quest Condition tree), duration{baseSeconds,skillVar,atMaxSeconds,modifiers[{var,atMin,atMax}]}, cost, sound, producesWaste
data_files.data/stats.json: needs / skills (growth curve tuning.skills.growthCurveExp makes high levels slower) / personality (static traits, e.g. cleanliness)
data_files.data/tuning.json: All tunables: character(+marker), camera(+rotate/twist), doors, fire(+panicSeconds), interaction, audio(+UI/feedback sounds), phone(+icon,jobListSize), work(+autoSpeed,promotionHappinessFactor), bills(intervalDays), bladderFailure, starvation, energyCollapse, feedback, waste, garbage, credit, visa(startStatus), view(wallCutHeight,wallTopColor), skills(growthCurveExp), quests, economy
data_files.data/quests.json + simstate.json: Quests (trigger/completion Condition trees, rewards funds/setVar/unlockAsset/grantVisa) + designer variables (visaStatus, job, income)
data_files.data/visas.json: Visa state machine defs (visitor 15d start, lmia, temp_worker, permanent_resident, citizen; durations/grace/applications)
data_files.data/jobs.json: Jobs: requirements(Condition), grantsVisa, hours, payPerShift, maxSkips, minCreditScore, needsCost, levels[{suffix,payPerShift,promoteChancePercent}]
data_files.data/finance.json: Formula bills/rent (base+perAssetValue*assetTotal; rent by propertyType+floor tiles), overdueDays/tooLateDays/negativeGraceDays
data_files.data/bills.json: Bill id/name list (amounts computed via finance.json)
data_files.data/happiness.json: Weighted happiness formula components (var, weight, min/max)
data_files.data/loading.json: Loading screen: phrases[], phraseIntervalSeconds, music, background, bar{fillColor,trackColor,height}
data_files.data/behavior.json: Autonomy scoring: needWeights, weights{needDeficit,distance,personalityAffinity}, decisionThreshold, condition-gated rules with scoreBonus
data_files.data/theme.json: UI theme: fonts, colors, shapes, per-component overrides, layout{anchor,offsetX/Y,hidden,accordion} per HUD element, accordions

tools: tools/assets.html (Asset Editor: everything on AssetDef + 3D preview w/ map-matched grid + sprite/GIF preview + character pose preview checkbox: sit/lie/use posed+animated via real game logic, off by default)
tools/interactions.html (Interaction Editor: all ActionDef fields incl. conditions builder, duration+modifiers, cost, waste, censor; warns on blank animation)
tools/tuning.html (Tuning Editor: generic tuning groups + needs/skills/personality add-remove)

tools/map.html (Map Editor: objects/floors/walls(kind+textures)/doors(on-wall apertures)/windows/spawn, rental ad card, exterior card, multi-map, undo, nav overlay, music + LIVE 3D pane: preview AND direct editing routed through the same 2D state/undo)
tools/animations.html (Animation Mapper: clipMap incl. FBX sources w/ mixamorig retargeting, marker, core states incl. sit_ground/pee/panic/collapse/starve)
tools/quests.html (Quest Editor: condition builder, rewards incl. grantVisa)
tools/career.html (Career Editor: visas + jobs CRUD incl. levels, minCreditScore)
tools/finance.html (Finance Editor: bill/rent formulas, thresholds, live preview, happiness formula card)
tools/behavior.html (Behavior Editor: autonomy weights/rules + live candidate-score preview)
tools/theme.html (Theme Editor: fonts/colors/shapes/layout/accordions + live mocked-HUD preview)

tools/social.html (Social Editor: NPC CRUD w/ stats.json trait sliders, relationship levels, compatibility, sim-to-sim interaction CRUD w/ level gates, phone/visit tuning, live preview via real game/social.ts)

verification_gates.typescript: npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target es2020 --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --skipLibCheck game/*.ts
verification_gates.pure_suites: npx tsx test/<name>.test.ts (ONE at a time). Suites: quests, visas, work, phone, bills, food, garbage, accidents, doors, windows, wallview, facing, usepose, seatground, bladder, duration, marker, camera, sprites, fbxclips, stats, happiness, promotion, contextmenu, buymode, nav, anim, charfit, interaction-conditions, audio, progressbar, locomotion.smoke, meshfit(tsx only), social, npc, social-interactions, contacts, visit-their-place
verification_gates.jsdom_suites: node test/*.test.mjs + node tools/*.test.mjs (asset/tuning/interaction/quest/career/finance/social editors, map-editor(SELF-DERIVING fixtures — keep it that way), animation-editor, toolnav, sw-routing, bills/hud smoke)
verification_gates.boot: GET http://localhost:5173 must boot (#boot gets class 'done'), zero new console errors

state_summary.shipped: Full sim loop (needs/skills/personality/autonomy/poses), quests, doors/windows/exterior door, wall-cut view, accidents+fire spread/destruction, transients, garbage/tidying+carry, carried food+perish+action costs, buy/sell mode (floor-only, wall-mount rules), PWA/mobile, audio (actions/assets/music/UI+feedback sounds), camera pan/pinch/rotate, sprites/GIF visuals, overhead marker, censor, progress bars (aligned), duration system w/ multi-var modifiers, interaction conditions, contextual radial action menu, asset lights+ON/OFF state, wall-mounted assets, VISA system (game over), phone (HUD icon, jobs, applications, bills, credit), going to work (hide+5x+pay+needsCost+skips), job levels+happiness-scaled promotions, finance (formula bills/rent, debt, repo man, credit score), bladder/energy/hunger failure events, skill/money floating feedback, 0.5m grid/0.25 snap. BATCH 7: Asset Editor preview shows in-game size grounded at y=0 (game transforms applied live); cooked-meal hunger scales with cooking skill (tuning.food); fridge-walk root cause fixed (food actions defer seat to second leg); progress bar camera-space anchoring fix (world-space offset projected wrong under isometric camera); work departure window (tuning.work.departureWindowHours, missed=skip at window close) + autonomous departure (happiness>=40 & energy>=25, tunable, wakes from sleep); LOADING SCREEN (real asset-load gate, sim time frozen, data/loading.json: phrases/music/background/bar, Tuning Editor Loading card, pure game/loading.ts). BATCH 8: utility-based autonomy (data/behavior.json needWeights/distance/personality-affinity weights + condition-gated rules; pure game/behavior.ts scoring differentiates assets by per-action gain rates, legacy lowest-need fallback) with Behavior Editor (tools/behavior.html, live ranked candidate-score preview via real scoring fns); UI theme system (data/theme.json -> game/theme.ts CSS custom properties, per-component overrides, anchor/offset/hidden layout per HUD element, accordion grouping, default reproduces prior look) with Theme Editor (tools/theme.html, live mocked-HUD preview). BATCH 9: floor/wall textures — floors[].texture / walls[].texture (public/textures drop-in), physical tiling via tuning.textures.metersPerTile, color fallback; GET /api/textures listing; Map Editor texture dropdowns + preview swatches in Floors/Walls inspectors. BATCH 10: black wall tops — every wall's top face is a shared unlit flat material (tuning.view.wallTopColor, default #000000), untextured regardless of texture/textureB, survives the wall-cut view (architecture-plan look); Asset Editor character pose preview — view-only 'Show character' checkbox (off by default) + always-offered sit/lie/use selector, rigged character loaded via the game's loadRiggedCharacter, default use preview positioned by real useSpotFor and authored use by usePoseFor, animated by the real AnimController, and labeled computed default vs authored (PROJECT_CONTEXT §7.33); B10-6..B10-8 add sparse source-first seat routing for bookshelf reading/study, preserve Practice English's seat-authored facing, and retain exact walkable restoration endpoints; B10-12 separates that safe endpoint from generic standing actions' precise useSpotFor point so cooking alignment and later navigation both hold (PROJECT_CONTEXT §7.34). APT BATCH 11 (partial): D1 door-in-plain-wall apertures (game/wallaperture.ts, on-wall doors matched geometrically, solid+lintel segments, Map Editor on-wall placement, PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.39); R1-R4 rental system — MapData.rental ads (shared tools/condition-builder.js), pure game/rental.ts listings, Kijiji phone tab, PendingMoveTracker + runtime map switch with simstate homeMap (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.40, ROADMAP_APT SHIPPED notes). B10-14..21: garbage fill bar (+occlusion), 3-axis meshFit offset, per-asset needMultipliers, abandoned-food waste fix, per-action meal tiers, skill progress bar, fullest-can trash routing.
